title: Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Goa

overview.short: Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary is located in South-Eastern Goa, India.
overview.description: Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary is located in South-Eastern Goa, India. It constitutes one of the vital corridors of the Western Ghats and covers an area of about 211km2. Netravali or Neturli is an important tributary of River Zuari, which originates in the sanctuary. Forests mostly consist of moist deciduous vegetation interspersed with evergreen and semi-evergreen habitat; there are also two all-season waterfalls in the sanctuary.

topPlaces.name: Netravali
topPlaces.description: Netravali is a census town in Sanguem taluka, Kushavati district in the state of Goa, India.

topPlaces.name: Curdi
topPlaces.description: Kurdi or Curdi is a village in Sanguem taluka of Goa. The village was submerged in the 1980s by the reservoir of the Salaulim Dam.

items.note: Netravali is a census town in Sanguem taluka, Kushavati district in the state of Goa, India.
Kurdi or Curdi is a village in Sanguem taluka of Goa. The village was submerged in the 1980s by the reservoir of the Salaulim Dam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (37 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Netravali Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Netravali, Curdi.
